description_long: This is a classic, long-barreled rifle with a wooden stock and a metal barrel, reminiscent of historical or hunting firearms. The stock is robust and extends into a straight comb, providing a solid shoulder rest. The barrel is slender and elongated, with a metallic finish, and the action appears to be bolt or lever-based, though the exact mechanism is not fully visible. The trigger guard and trigger are clearly defined beneath the action, and there is a simple iron sight mounted along the top of the barrel. The rifle lacks any visible modern attachments such as optics, rails, or tactical accessories. The overall design suggests durability and traditional craftsmanship, suitable for hunting or historical reenactment in an urban or rural setting.
description: A traditional long-barreled rifle with a wooden stock and metal barrel, featuring iron sights and a classic design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, with the wooden stock, metal barrel, and iron sights clearly visible.
description_view_1: Front-on view showing the narrow profile of the barrel and the alignment of the iron sights.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the first, with the stock and barrel visible from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the width of the stock and the straight alignment of the barrel.
